prompt:
(masterpiece, best quality, 8K, ultra-detailed), Japanese manga style, refined ink outlines and moderate line weight, screentone shading, high contrast, dramatic shadows, hand-drawn illustration aesthetic, full-body front-view portrait, pure white background, single character, young adult male with plain average features, unremarkable face, slightly tired eyes with faint dark circles, relaxed posture suggesting a hands-on repair technician, calloused fingers, practical no-nonsense appearance, ordinary build neither muscular nor thin.

--面部系统--
8K hyper-realistic anime facial modeling, refined manga-style line art with soft outlines, average-proportion jawline with no sharp definition, plain rounded face shape, small unremarkable eyes with a quiet observant gaze, slight fatigue lines under eyes, ordinary nose bridge, neutral relaxed mouth, soft ink outlines around eyes and lips, minimal iris highlights suggesting understated presence, natural matte skin tone with slight unevenness, matte translucent lip color, lip peak highlight strength 0.3, lip line depth 0.15.

--头发系统--
defined hair strands with refined outlines, short to medium-length messy unkempt hair suggesting low-maintenance lifestyle, slightly uneven cut, distinct clumps of hair with screentone shading, intricate hair strands, root fixation coefficient 0.95, tip swing amplitude 10cm,
color layering: main color #3B3131, secondary color #4E4545, highlight #6E6363, shadow #1A1212, 3-5 strands of gradient per cluster, natural color transition,
physical wind simulation: point wind source behind neck (wind speed 1.2m/s, turbulence intensity 5%), wind direction 45°.

--衣物系统--
crisp clothing with clean folds and soft outlines, subtle screentone on fabric, slight shoulder line folds (depth 0.3), worn utility jacket in muted dark grey-green over a simple faded black crew-neck shirt, cargo pants with multiple tool pockets, scuffed work boots, a small multi-tool clipped to belt, fabric: matte slightly worn texture with subtle stain marks on sleeves suggesting frequent repair work, practical workwear appearance with no decorative elements.

--视角与构图--
perspective locked: full-body front view, eye-level, focal length 50mm, depth of field f/2.8, focal plane on character, pure white background only, no background elements,
action constraints: standing straight, arms relaxed at sides, hands slightly open with fingers loosely curled as if accustomed to gripping tools, completely static, no unnecessary movements., no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words, aspect ratio 1024:1536, portrait orientation

side.prompt:
Generate a full-body, side-view portrait of character protagonist based on the provided front-view portrait, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Facing left. Standing with arms relaxed at sides.
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.

back.prompt:
Generate a full-body, back-view portrait of character protagonist based on the provided front-view portrait, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. No facial features should be visible.
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
